originalTitle: Coleman to end 17-year Everton playing career
originalDescription: Seamus Coleman will finish his Everton playing career at the end of the season, when his contract expires after 17 years at the club.

originalTitle: Play-off final tickets on sale despite Spygate uncertainty
originalDescription: Both Hull and Southampton are selling Championship play-off final tickets despite uncertainty over whether the game will go ahead as scheduled.

originalTitle: Three more VAR errors confirmed by Premier League panel
originalDescription: Three more video assistant referee errors are confirmed by the Premier League's Key Match Incidents panel, taking the total number this season to 23.

originalDescription: Newcastle United ended a 70-year wait for a major domestic trophy by winning the League Cup last season but further members of that side look set to leave.

originalTitle: NBA: Refs right in no-call at end of Cavs-Pistons
originalDescription: The NBA said Thursday that officials were correct in not calling a foul on Jarrett Allen in the closing seconds of regulation of Game 5 between the Cavaliers and Pistons on Wednesday night.

originalTitle: Sources: Warriors' top two assistants won't return...
originalDescription: Warriors assistants Terry Stotts and Jerry Stackhouse are departing the franchise, league sources told ESPN.

originalTitle: Myers: 76ers' next GM must work 'in harmony'
originalDescription: Bob Myers, who is overseeing the 76ers' general manager search, said the franchise is looking for 'good people that are in harmony' to help them win a championship.

originalTitle: Cavs rally for OT win, head home with 3-2 lead
originalDescription: The Cavaliers came back from a nine-point deficit late in regulation to beat the Pistons 117-113 in overtime and take a 3-2 lead in the Eastern Conference semifinals.

originalTitle: NBA defends 11% rise in foul calls during playoffs...
originalDescription: NBA referees are calling about 11% more personal fouls per game in these playoffs than they did during the regular season -- one of the largest differentials in NBA history.
